metadata.description: GeckoVision plugins for making APIs agent-usable.

plugins.name: gecko-surf
plugins.description: Make any API agent-usable — even with broken docs, no OpenAPI, a WAF, or an auth wall. Comprehend a spec (or JS-rendered docs) into first-call-correct MCP tools your agent calls right the first time (8%→61% on a painful API, measured), auth injected, no integration code. Bundles use-any-api, read-js-docs, anti-poisoning, api-agent-ready, x402-payai-setup, plus agents, commands, and a live TxLINE demo MCP.
